subject: feat: dynamic pattern discovery from YAML frontmatter
body:
Patterns are no longer hardcoded in index.html cards or the
pattern.html PATTERNS map. Adding a new pattern is now a single
step: drop a .md file with YAML frontmatter into
docs/implementations/ and it appears in the app automatically.

Implementation:
- Added YAML frontmatter (slug, title, badge, description, tags,
  order) to all 10 pattern .md files
- New generatePatternManifest Vite plugin scans docs/implementations/,
  parses frontmatter, validates required fields, and serves
  patterns/manifest.json (dev middleware + build-time emit)
- pattern.html fetches manifest to resolve slug → file mapping
  (replaces hardcoded 7-entry PATTERNS map)
- index.html renders pattern cards dynamically from manifest
  (replaces 90 lines of hardcoded HTML with a fetch + DOM build)
- stripFrontmatter in src/markdown.js prevents frontmatter from
  rendering as visible content
- Scroll observer and card-interactive behaviors refactored to
  work with dynamically inserted elements
- globPatterns updated to include json for SW precaching

All 10 patterns now visible (was 7 — EVENT_BUS, Z_INDEX_SCALE,
PWA_ICON_CACHE_BUST were missing from the UI).

Tags: feature, patterns, dynamic-content, vite-plugin
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: minor
